'''Elis''' was a leader of a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] village on [[Anobis]]. He was one of the leading members in the civil war on that [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

==Biography==
When [[Anja Gallandro]] tricked [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]], [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina]] and [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], and the remnants of the farming village into coming to his village for negotiations, Elis captured them. After his younger brother [[Protas (Human)|Protas]] was killed by one of Anja's burrowing detonators by accident, Elis ordered [[Yuos]], the leader of the farming village, before him; he was about to kill him when the Solos convinced him to end the war.

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Return to Ord Mantell]]'' {{1st}}
